brand_identity.name: Yrvante
brand_identity.mission: Empowering ZZP'ers and small businesses with engineering-grade web solutions.
brand_identity.tone: Precision, Clarity, Dutch Minimalism, Elegant Engineering
brand_identity.aesthetic: Strict Black & White, High Contrast, Serif Typography, Asymmetric Layouts

headings.usage: Use for H1-H3. Keep H1 massive (text-6xl+).

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs and UI elements.

mono.usage: Use for small labels, technical specs, and overlines.

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black border border-black transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs font-mono
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-black border-b border-black hover:opacity-70 transition-opacity rounded-none px-0 py-2

cards.style: bg-white border border-gray-200 p-8 hover:border-black transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-gray-300 focus:border-black outline-none py-4 px-0 rounded-none transition-colors placeholder:text-gray-400

navigation.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-gray-100

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients. Stick to solid Black and White.
Do NOT use rounded corners greater than 2px. Prefer sharp edges (rounded-none).
Use 'Playfair Display' for Headings to match the logo's serif style.
Ensure 'Smart web & software' slogan is visible near the hero.
Contact form must send emails to yvar@yrvante.com (simulated).
Language toggle (EN/NL) must be present in the nav.
Use asymmetric layouts (e.g., 8 col text, 4 col image) to avoid boredom.
implementation_steps: Step 1: Install dependencies: `yarn add framer-motion @studio-freight/react-lenis lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge`.
Step 2: Update `tailwind.config.js` with the Yrvante theme (colors, fonts).
Step 3: Create the global layout wrapper with Lenis scroll and Navbar.
Step 4: Build the Landing Page sections sequentially (Hero -> Services -> About -> Contact).
Step 5: Implement the Contact Form with validation.
